## What does this PR do?

<!-- Brief description. If it adds/changes an exhibit, name it. -->

## Type

- [ ] New in-repo exhibit (`exhibits/<slug>/`)
- [ ] New externally-hosted exhibit (`registry/external-exhibits.json`)
- [ ] Fix / improvement to an existing exhibit
- [ ] Site, gallery, or tooling change
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally
- [ ] `exhibits.json` is regenerated and committed (`npm run build`) — if exhibits changed
- [ ] Tested via a local server (`python3 -m http.server`)
- [ ] Thumbnail included and renders in the gallery — if applicable
- [ ] Accessible: readable contrast, keyboard-usable controls, alt text where meaningful

## Licensing

- [ ] I agree to release my **code under MIT** and my **content under the license in the exhibit's
      manifest** (CC BY 4.0 by default), and I have the right to do so.
